title: SQLITE_FCNTL_SIZE_HINT overflows an array
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC;
ALTER TABLE test_table UPDATE value = toInt32(value) WHERE id = 1;
